svg.title: PostmortemCLI – layer architecture with dual terminal
svg.desc: Structural layer diagram showing Terminal 1 and Terminal 2 side by side with named communication protocols

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does postmortemcli start work from Terminal 1?')
sendPrompt('How does postmortemcli send work from Terminal 2?')
sendPrompt('What does launcher.py do for start?')
sendPrompt('What does launcher.py do for send?')
g.text: runs on host · smtplib · no container

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does main.py do in PostmortemCLI?')
g.text: interactive prompt · container verification · SMTP background thread

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How are DNS lookups used in PostmortemCLI?')
sendPrompt('How are VirusTotal and MalwareBazaar used?')
